## Problem
What gap or limitation are you hitting? Link any relevant AT Protocol lexicon or spec.

## Proposed solution
Describe the API or behaviour you'd like. Include the affected module and a sketch of the function signature if you have one:
```c
/* wf_status wf_...(...) */
```

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches (e.g. using an existing module differently).
